name: second-brain
description: Knowledge management tools for building and maintaining a Second Brain vault. Three skills: (1) Second Brain Setup & Audit — sets up or audits Obsidian vaults using the Three Brains framework; (2) Knowledge Ingest — drop any URL or YouTube transcript and it is automatically fetched, summarised, wikilinked, and routed to the right Knowledge Base subfolder; (3) Framework Extractor — turns books, courses, and frameworks into structured Claude Cowork Skills and plugins via a 5-phase decode-build-audit-architect workflow.
